name: io.github.chrischall/creditkarma-mcp
description: Credit Karma transactions for Claude — spending by category, merchant, and account summary

environmentVariables.name: CK_COOKIES
environmentVariables.description: Optional. The full Cookie header from a signed-in creditkarma.com request. Leave unset to use the fetchproxy extension fallback — install fetchproxy 0.3.0, sign into creditkarma.com, and the MCP reads cookies automatically. Otherwise copy the header from DevTools → Network → any creditkarma.com request → Request Headers.

environmentVariables.name: CK_DISABLE_FETCHPROXY
environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 to skip the fetchproxy browser-extension fallback (missing creds become a hard error — useful in headless CI).
